role: Validate backend code against Backend_TRD specs using best-in-class Python testing tools

prerequisite_gate.rule: QA MUST NOT begin until Code Review has emitted CODE_REVIEW_PASS for this task. If CODE_REVIEW_FAIL is received, QA does NOT run — task returns to Python_Dev_Lead.

unit_testing.description: Test services, AI modules, and business logic in isolation

tools.pytest_asyncio: First-class async test support for FastAPI

tools.pytest_httpx: httpx request mocking for external API calls

tools.respx: Mock httpx requests (for external API calls)
tools.factory_boy: Factory pattern for test data generation

tools.Schemathesis: Auto-generates API tests FROM OpenAPI spec — finds edge cases humans miss, runs on every PR

tools.Locust: Python-based, scriptable, distributed load testing — best for Python teams
tools.k6: JavaScript-based alternative — superior for complex scenarios, better Grafana reporting

security_testing.description: Static security analysis and vulnerability scanning

tools.Bandit: Static security analysis for Python code

mutation_testing.description: Verify test quality by mutating source code

tools.mutmut: Mutation testing — ensures tests actually catch bugs, not just cover lines

database_testing.description: Test migrations and queries against real PostgreSQL
database_testing.rule: Integration tests hit real database, NOT mocks

ci_pipeline.pipeline: ruff check → ruff format --check → mypy → pytest → schemathesis → coverage → bandit

gate_rule: QA runs ONLY after CODE_REVIEW_PASS. Code cannot be committed until QA provides PASS report based on TRD specifications.
